faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Queens Village?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Queens Village typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500 depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method selected. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Queens Village homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments take 4-8 hours for heat treatment or 2-3 hours for chemical application. Follow-up visits are usually scheduled 2-3 weeks later to ensure complete elimination. The entire process typically spans 3-4 weeks for full eradication.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for families and pets in Queens Village?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments are EPA-approved and safe when applied by our licensed professionals. For chemical treatments, we recommend a 4-6 hour absence from treated areas. Heat treatments are pesticide-free and safe for families with children, pets, and individuals with chemical sensitivities.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatment in Queens Village?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer a 60-day warranty on all bed bug treatments in Queens Village. If bed bugs return within this period and you've followed our preparation and prevention guidelines, we'll re-treat your home at no additional charge.
